overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night using a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a survival video game, featuring rocky terrain, fallen logs, and dense trees illuminated by warm artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with fallen timber

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark forest, illuminating the rocky path ahead with a flashlight

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders lining the right side of the path
pile of decaying logs and timber on the right side of the trail
small leafy bush illuminated by the flashlight on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a dark forest at night. The flashlight illuminates a rocky trail with mossy boulders and fallen logs on the right side and green undergrowth on the left. The path is narrow and enclosed by dense trees invisible in the darkness beyond the light's reach.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest path between dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing deeper into the forest, passing a large tree trunk on the right

entered.detail: tall tree trunk with rough bark passing by on the right side of the path
thick vegetation and bushes crowding the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a denser section of forest as the rocky terrain gives way to a narrower path flanked by thick vegetation. A prominent large tree trunk passes by on the right side as the camera continues forward into increasingly dark and enclosed woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark forest that transitions from a rocky trail into an increasingly enclosed woodland. It begins by navigating a narrow path where a flashlight illuminates mossy boulders, fallen logs, and green undergrowth against a backdrop of impenetrable darkness. As the camera pushes forward, the rocky terrain gradually gives way to a denser section of the forest flanked by thick vegetation. The scene then tightens as a prominent large tree trunk passes on the right, leading the viewer deeper into the oppressive shadows of the woodland.
